title: Legends Cobblemon
body:
Legends: Arceus in Minecraft. I have been playing a lot of cobblemon recently and have loved the idea of having a game like Legends: Arceus in Minecraft, so I did it. 

Fixed the controls bug and added create and distant horizons just because. Sorry for the absence of updates. 

### Getting Started
When you start the game, you spawn with 6 pokeballs, a backpack, and some bread. You get the option of the Hisuian starters. Once you begin your adventure, you will eventually need more pokeballs. The regular pokeballs are off limits and uncraftable, leaving you the ancient balls and only the ancient balls. You will have to find Tumblestones to be able to make more Pokeballs. These can be found most commonly in suspicious gravel in ruins. This is where I would recommend you go to get Tumblestones. Additionally, they can be farmed. Refer to the wiki for more information. Good luck and enjoy my modpack!
